data.title: Customer Obsession
data.description: Relentless focus on maintaining customer satisfaction and trust.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of feedback loops and customer service excellence.

data.title: Operational Excellence
data.description: Strives for continuous improvement in operational processes.
data.technical_spec: Use of Six Sigma and lean methodologies for process optimization.

data.title: Innovation
data.description: Commitment to technological and business innovation.
data.technical_spec: Investment in R&D and adoption of emerging technologies.

data.title: Long-Term Thinking
data.description: Focus on sustainable growth and investments for the future.
data.technical_spec: Strategic long-term investments in technologies and markets.

data.title: Leadership Principle
data.description: Guided by a set of core leadership principles in decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Principles embedded in company culture and daily operations.
